use_codes.desc: FOR THE TOPICAL TREATMENT OF PLAQUE PSORIASIS IN PATIENTS 18 YEARS OF AGE AND OLDER

indications.text:
LEXETTE™ is indicated for the topical treatment of plaque psoriasis in patients 12 years of age
and older.

LEXETTE™ is indicated for the topical treatment of plaque psoriasis in patients 18 years of age
and older.

Halobetasol Propionate Topical Foam is indicated for the topical treatment of plaque psoriasis in
patients 18 years of age and older.

LEXETTE® is indicated for the topical treatment of plaque psoriasis in patients 18 years of age
and older.
